images.ocr:
[VLM first-pass — Claude, NOT an expert-verified transcription]

Script: Tham Lanna (Tai Tham). Support: DLNTM / Chiang Mai University Library digitisation; text in ink on a dark, low-contrast ground (blackened mulberry paper / high-contrast photographic capture). ~11 lines of dense cursive.
Folio number: ๒ (folio 2), marked top-left.
Work: "Holasat" (โหราศาสตร์) — a Lanna astrology / horoscopy treatise.

Body reading: the hand is regular monastic Tham Lanna, but on this dark ground a faithful glyph-by-glyph transliteration needs contrast-normalisation (see transcribe.py preprocess) plus expert paleographic verification. Not asserting line text here to avoid seeding the corpus with unverified readings. Confidence in body ~0.2; confidence in script + folio number ~0.9.

Note: seq 2 (sha 20048d58…) appears to be a duplicate exposure of this same folio.

[VLM first-pass — Claude, NOT an expert-verified transcription]

Script: Tham Lanna (Tai Tham). Support: DLNTM / Chiang Mai University Library digitisation; text in ink on a dark, low-contrast ground (blackened mulberry paper / high-contrast photographic capture). ~11 lines of dense cursive.
Folio number: ๒ (folio 2), marked top-left.
Work: "Holasat" (โหราศาสตร์) — a Lanna astrology / horoscopy treatise.

Body reading: the hand is regular monastic Tham Lanna, but on this dark ground a faithful glyph-by-glyph transliteration needs contrast-normalisation (see transcribe.py preprocess) plus expert paleographic verification. Not asserting line text here to avoid seeding the corpus with unverified readings. Confidence in body ~0.2; confidence in script + folio number ~0.9.

Note: seq 2 (sha 20048d58…) appears to be a duplicate exposure of this same folio.

[VLM first-pass — Claude, NOT an expert-verified transcription]

Script: Tham Lanna (Tai Tham). Support: DLNTM / Chiang Mai University Library; ink on dark low-contrast ground. This capture stacks two folios (upper + lower), each ~15 lines of dense cursive.
Folio number: ๓ (folio 3), marked top-left.
Work: "Holasat" (โหราศาสตร์) — Lanna astrology / horoscopy.

Body reading: after contrast-normalisation (autocontrast + equalize + unsharp) legibility improves markedly, but a faithful transliteration still needs the multi-pass transcribe.py run + expert review. Withholding line text rather than fabricating. Confidence in body ~0.3 (post-enhancement); script + folio number ~0.9.

Note: seq 4 (sha 303b2917…) appears to be a duplicate exposure of this same folio.

[VLM first-pass — Claude, NOT an expert-verified transcription]
